data_policy.scope: Public Infinix phone models only; excludes tablets, laptops, accessories, TVs, and carrier/SKU duplicates.
data_policy.variant_rule: variants contain RAM/storage combinations only; no color/country/carrier/model-number variants.
data_policy.image_policy: image_url is null unless a direct product image URL is safely verified; no blocked GSMChoice file URLs are used.
data_policy.variant_policy: Variants are RAM/storage combinations only; country/carrier/model-number SKUs are intentionally not represented as separate devices.
data_policy.truthfulness_note: This v2 enriches verified/source-backed variants where accessible. It does not mark the entire catalog as perfect because many historical Infinix RAM/storage combinations remain unverified from accessible public sources.

data_quality.scope: Infinix public phone models only; excludes tablets/XPad, laptops, watches, earbuds and accessories; no country/carrier SKU duplication.
data_quality.variant_policy: RAM/storage options only. Country, carrier, chipset-region, SIM and model-number variants are not separate catalog entries.
data_quality.completeness_note: Expanded against Infinix official current product listing, GSMChoice Infinix catalog pages, and DeviceSpecifications Infinix brand listing. Older/regional public models may still need manual reconciliation against GSMArena/official archives before claiming absolute worldwide completeness.
data_quality.variant_verification_note: Variants marked verified_from_public_memory_listing are extracted from public RAM/internal-memory fields. When sources list RAM and storage independently, combinations are possible combinations, not country/SKU variants.
